overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting navigation through an Arasaka corporate facility. The sequence begins in a red-lit industrial corridor, transitions via a ladder ascent, and proceeds through a sterile office environment and robotic showroom before approaching a secure door.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial corridor with red neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark industrial corridor illuminated by vertical red neon strips

entered.detail: vertical red neon light strips mounted on dark metal pillars
illuminated circular logo with three dots on the wall
dark metal wall panels with horizontal grating patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow industrial corridor bathed in red neon light. The camera moves forward past metal grating walls and a circular Arasaka logo, with vertical neon pillars lining the path ahead.

events.description: emerges from dark shaft into brightly lit area

agents.ego_description: climbing a yellow ladder in a dark vertical shaft transitioning between facility levels

entered.detail: yellow metal ladder with safety rails extending upward
dark concrete walls of the vertical shaft

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a yellow ladder through a dark vertical shaft, transitioning from the red-lit corridor below. The environment shifts from neon-lit industrial to dim concrete as the camera climbs upward toward a brighter area above.

scene_state.functional_zone: Arasaka corporate reception area with illuminated signage

events.description: exits maintenance shaft into pristine corporate office environment
lighting shifts from dim to bright fluorescent as entering main office

agents.ego_description: walking through a modern corporate office with the Arasaka logo prominently displayed on white walls

entered.detail: large backlit ARASAKA corporate logo on white wall
black reception counter with monitors and equipment
long white fluorescent light strips on ceiling

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the maintenance shaft, the scene transitions to a pristine corporate office with bright fluorescent lighting. The camera moves past a reception desk toward a large illuminated Arasaka sign, with elevator doors visible at the end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-tech showroom with robotic manufacturing displays

events.description: entering robotic assembly display area with mechanical arms

agents.ego_description: walking past displays of robotic arms and manufacturing equipment in a showroom

entered.detail: large white robotic assembly arms on illuminated display platforms
workstations with multiple monitors and interfaces
yellow industrial crates with warning labels

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a spacious showroom featuring large robotic assembly arms on display. The environment combines industrial equipment with corporate aesthetics, as the character walks past control workstations and yellow equipment cases while the Arasaka logo remains visible in the background.

events.description: slowing approach toward secure door marked with number 5

agents.ego_description: approaching a secure door labeled with the number 5 at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: large secure door with illuminated number 5 and vertical red light strip
stacked black and yellow storage crates

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to a secure door marked with the number 5. The corridor narrows as the camera moves past equipment crates toward the door, which features a vertical red light strip and the Arasaka logo visible in the distance to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a moody, red-lit industrial zone into the sterile, high-tech heart of a corporate facility. It begins in a narrow corridor bathed in red neon light, moving past metal grating and vertical pillars before transitioning upward via a yellow ladder through a dim concrete shaft. As the camera emerges from the shaft, the oppressive red glow shifts to bright fluorescent lighting within a pristine corporate office, gliding past a reception desk toward a large illuminated Arasaka sign. The scene then expands into a spacious showroom featuring robotic assembly arms and control workstations, blending industrial machinery with corporate aesthetics. Finally, the camera moves through a narrowing corridor past equipment crates, approaching a secure door marked with the number 5 and a vertical red light strip.
